title: 为 GPU 分区(GPU-P)写入显存配额
code:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p }; return $j }
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# 0) 确认存在可分区 GPU
$pgpu = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_PartitionableGpu | Select-Object -First 1
# 1) 创建第二代测试虚拟机(已有 $vm/$vssd2 时可跳过)
# 2) 添加裸 GPU 分区：须为 RASD 设置资源身份，否则 AddResourceSettings 被 Job 拒绝(ErrorCode=32773)
$gp = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_GpuPartitionSettingData").CreateInstance()
$gp.ResourceType    = [uint16]32770
$gp.ResourceSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:GPU Partition'
$gp.PoolID          = ''
# Min/Max/Optimal 共 12 个配额字段在 Add 阶段保持 NULL(不要赋 0)，交由 AddResourceSettings 处理
$add = $vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd2.__PATH, @($gp.GetText(1)))
if($add.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $null = Wait-Job2 $add.Job }
$newPath = $add.ResultingResourceSettings | Select-Object -First 1
# 3) 写入配额：Min=0；VRAM 的 Max/Optimal 用真实字节数(例 11GiB=11811160064)；Encode/Decode/Compute 的 Max/Optimal 用全 1 哨兵值 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
$ALLONES = [uint64]'18446744073709551615'
$VRAM    = [uint64]11811160064
$gpr = [wmi]$newPath
$gpr.MinPartitionVRAM=[uint64]0;    $gpr.MaxPartitionVRAM=$VRAM;      $gpr.OptimalPartitionVRAM=$VRAM
$gpr.MinPartitionEncode=[uint64]0;  $gpr.MaxPartitionEncode=$ALLONES; $gpr.OptimalPartitionEncode=$ALLONES
$gpr.MinPartitionDecode=[uint64]0;  $gpr.MaxPartitionDecode=$ALLONES; $gpr.OptimalPartitionDecode=$ALLONES
$gpr.MinPartitionCompute=[uint64]0; $gpr.MaxPartitionCompute=$ALLONES;$gpr.OptimalPartitionCompute=$ALLONES
$m = $vsms.ModifyResourceSettings($gpr.GetText(1))
if($m.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $null = Wait-Job2 $m.Job }
# 4) 读回验证
$gpRead = ([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_GpuPartitionSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
'MaxVRAM='+$gpRead.MaxPartitionVRAM+' MaxEnc='+$gpRead.MaxPartitionEncode
output:
PartitionableGpuCount=3
GpuName=\\?\PCI#VEN_10DE&DEV_2702&SUBSYS_10DE1771&REV_A1#4&22525bed&0&0030#{064092b3-625e-43bf-9eb5-dc845897dd59}\GPUPARAV
VM created: WMITEST_gpu_partition_vram
AddResourceSettings(bare) rv=0
ResultingResourceSettings=...Msvm_GpuPartitionSettingData.InstanceID="Microsoft:3C686D12-...\\F555E267-..."
ModifyResourceSettings rv=0
READBACK: MinVRAM=0 MaxVRAM=11811160064 OptVRAM=11811160064 MaxEnc=18446744073709551615 MaxDec=18446744073709551615 MaxCmp=18446744073709551615
Cleanup: VM destroyed
RESULT=PASS
notes: 前置条件：宿主须存在可分区 GPU(Msvm_PartitionableGpu)。
对 CreateInstance() 得到的 Msvm_GpuPartitionSettingData 直接调用 AddResourceSettings 会被 Job 拒绝(JobState=10，ErrorCode=32773，无法添加资源)。原因并非配额取值，而是裸实例缺少资源身份。
添加分区前须显式设置 ResourceType=[uint16]32770、ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:GPU Partition'、PoolID=''(基元 GPU-P 池)。三项齐备后 AddResourceSettings 同步返回 0。
12 个配额属性(Min/Max/Optimal × VRAM/Encode/Decode/Compute)在 Add 阶段须保持 NULL：CreateInstance() 序列化的 <PROPERTY> 本无 <VALUE>，提供程序按默认处理；不要赋 0。配额在第二步通过 ModifyResourceSettings 下发。
配额取值规则：Min=0 可接受。Encode/Decode/Compute 的 Max/Optimal 可用全 1 哨兵值 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF(=18446744073709551615)。VRAM 的 Max/Optimal 不接受全 1，须给出真实字节数(例 11811160064=11GiB)，否则被拒。
语义对照：Add-VMGpuPartitionAdapter 默认添加的是无配额裸分区(WMI 读回 Min/Max/Optimal 均为 NULL)；Set-VMGpuPartitionAdapter 才下发上述哨兵值。本配方等价于 Add+Set 两步的 WMI 形式。
AddResourceSettings 的 OUT 参数为 ResultingResourceSettings(数组，取 [0] 得到新 RASD 路径)。写操作可能同步返回 0，也可能返回 4096 进入 Job；脚本保留 Wait-Job2 作为兜底。
GPU-P 字段集自 build 14393 起提供，全版本稳定；NumaAwarePlacement 属性自 build 22621 起提供。
title_en: Write video-memory quotas to a GPU partition (GPU-P)
notes_en: Prerequisite: the host must have a partitionable GPU (Msvm_PartitionableGpu).

Calling AddResourceSettings directly on an Msvm_GpuPartitionSettingData obtained from CreateInstance() is rejected by the job (JobState=10, ErrorCode=32773, cannot add resource). The cause is not the quota values but that the bare instance lacks a resource identity.

Before adding the partition, ResourceType=[uint16]32770, ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:GPU Partition', and PoolID='' (the primordial GPU-P pool) must be set explicitly. Once all three are present, AddResourceSettings returns 0 synchronously.

The 12 quota properties (Min/Max/Optimal x VRAM/Encode/Decode/Compute) must remain NULL during the Add phase: the <PROPERTY> serialized by CreateInstance() carries no <VALUE>, and the provider treats it as default; do not assign 0. The quotas are submitted in the second step via ModifyResourceSettings.

Quota value rules: Min=0 is acceptable. The Max/Optimal of Encode/Decode/Compute may use the all-ones sentinel value 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF (=18446744073709551615). The Max/Optimal of VRAM does not accept all-ones and must be given a real byte count (e.g. 11811160064=11GiB), otherwise it is rejected.

Semantic mapping: Add-VMGpuPartitionAdapter by default adds a bare partition without quotas (WMI reads back Min/Max/Optimal as NULL); Set-VMGpuPartitionAdapter is what submits the sentinel values above. This recipe is the WMI form of the two-step Add+Set.

The OUT parameter of AddResourceSettings is ResultingResourceSettings (an array; take [0] to get the new RASD path). Write operations may return 0 synchronously or return 4096 and enter a job; the script retains Wait-Job2 as a fallback.
The GPU-P field set has been available since build 14393 and is stable across all versions; the NumaAwarePlacement property has been available since build 22621.
code_en:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p }; return $j }
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# 0) Confirm a partitionable GPU is present
$pgpu = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_PartitionableGpu | Select-Object -First 1
# 1) Create a Generation 2 test virtual machine (skip when $vm/$vssd2 already exist)
# 2) Add a bare GPU partition: the RASD must have its resource identity set, or AddResourceSettings is rejected by the job (ErrorCode=32773)
$gp = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_GpuPartitionSettingData").CreateInstance()
$gp.ResourceType    = [uint16]32770
$gp.ResourceSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:GPU Partition'
$gp.PoolID          = ''
# The 12 quota fields (Min/Max/Optimal) stay NULL during the Add phase (do not assign 0); leave them to AddResourceSettings
$add = $vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd2.__PATH, @($gp.GetText(1)))
if($add.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $null = Wait-Job2 $add.Job }
$newPath = $add.ResultingResourceSettings | Select-Object -First 1
# 3) Write quotas: Min=0; use real byte counts for VRAM Max/Optimal (e.g. 11GiB=11811160064); use the all-ones sentinel 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF for Encode/Decode/Compute Max/Optimal
$ALLONES = [uint64]'18446744073709551615'
$VRAM    = [uint64]11811160064
$gpr = [wmi]$newPath
$gpr.MinPartitionVRAM=[uint64]0;    $gpr.MaxPartitionVRAM=$VRAM;      $gpr.OptimalPartitionVRAM=$VRAM
$gpr.MinPartitionEncode=[uint64]0;  $gpr.MaxPartitionEncode=$ALLONES; $gpr.OptimalPartitionEncode=$ALLONES
$gpr.MinPartitionDecode=[uint64]0;  $gpr.MaxPartitionDecode=$ALLONES; $gpr.OptimalPartitionDecode=$ALLONES
$gpr.MinPartitionCompute=[uint64]0; $gpr.MaxPartitionCompute=$ALLONES;$gpr.OptimalPartitionCompute=$ALLONES
$m = $vsms.ModifyResourceSettings($gpr.GetText(1))
if($m.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $null = Wait-Job2 $m.Job }
# 4) Read back to verify
$gpRead = ([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_GpuPartitionSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
'MaxVRAM='+$gpRead.MaxPartitionVRAM+' MaxEnc='+$gpRead.MaxPartitionEncode
